official_channels.crawler_method: source_registry seed -> link discovery -> html/pdf snapshot -> field extraction -> human publish gate
official_channels.rate_limit: 1 request per source every 8-15 seconds during live fetch
official_channels.policy: Only public school pages, PDFs, FAQs, and application-system landing pages. Check robots.txt and terms before live fetch.

official_channels.crawler_method: PDF/FAQ detector -> text extraction -> citation snippets -> reviewer confirmation
official_channels.policy: Use official PDF/FAQ only; never infer current-cycle requirements from old PDFs without status label.

community_channels.name: Public GitHub CS application repositories
community_channels.crawler_method: repository allowlist -> markdown snapshot -> keyword extraction -> community reference only
community_channels.rate_limit: GitHub API or raw page low-rate, cache snapshots
community_channels.policy: Only public repositories. Keep source attribution. Do not copy long passages.

community_channels.name: TheGradCafe public results and discussions
community_channels.crawler_method: manual search URL or user-provided public excerpt -> normalized signal -> no official overwrite
community_channels.policy: Community self-reports only; never use as admission probability or official requirement.

community_channels.name: Public forum and social-web search
community_channels.crawler_method: search query plan -> human opens public pages -> short excerpt capture -> reviewer labels confidence
community_channels.rate_limit: manual or search-api compliant usage only
community_channels.policy: Only public pages that do not require login/paywall. Respect robots and platform terms. Store short snippets, source URL, and boundary label.

community_channels.name: Public Chinese admissions forum pages
community_channels.crawler_method: compliant search API/manual search -> public thread URL allowlist -> short excerpt -> reviewer labels programme/year/source boundary
community_channels.rate_limit: manual review or compliant search API; no login-wall or private group crawling
community_channels.policy: Use public web pages only. Do not mirror competitor databases or copy long passages. Community claims never become official requirements.

community_channels.name: Official student stories and programme news
community_channels.crawler_method: school-domain search -> official story/news page snapshot -> short contextual signal -> reviewer confirms boundary
community_channels.rate_limit: queued low-rate fetch with robots check
community_channels.policy: Official school storytelling pages can provide context only unless the page states a formal requirement.

community_channels.name: Public video/note experience search
community_channels.crawler_method: public search result -> metadata/snippet capture -> human opens original public page -> no private comments or account-only content
community_channels.rate_limit: manual review preferred; obey platform robots and terms
community_channels.policy: Only public metadata and short excerpts. Do not collect private profiles, comments, IDs, or paywalled content.
